programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After getting his groceries stolen, Squidward convinces SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate. SpongeBob finds a nasty sea urchin living in the Krusty Krab, and tries everything to force it out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Mutiny on the Krusty; The Whole Tooth

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr Krabs fires SpongeBob. Unable to just do nothing, SpongeBob decides to go back to work doing anything, anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Truth about Franco: Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship
programme.desc: At the end of a bloody civil war, Francisco Franco seized power and ruled Spain with an iron hand for nearly four decades. Under his leadership the conservative, monarchist armed forces staged a coup against Spain's republican government which had been democratically elected. The insurrection was supported by Italy and Germany. Three years of bitter civil war followed which, by April 1939, had turned Spain into a different country. The hostilities and political purges cost half a million lives.

programme.title: The Truth about Franco: Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship
programme.desc: Franco gave himself the title of Caudillo de España - Supreme Leader of Spain - and created his own rituals of power: the war hero, the family man, and the mass murderer. Franco was a man of many faces.

programme.title: The Truth about Franco: Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship
programme.desc: At the end of the Second World War the cards in global politics were reshuffled, and the situation became critical for Franco because in Spain many suffered from his reign of terror. For that reason, there were many who wanted to topple him.

programme.title: The Truth about Franco: Spain's Forgotten Dictatorship
programme.desc: In the mid-1950s Franco's foreign policy successes opened up new perspectives for Spain - and new challenges. As Spain began to change, Franco did what he could to cling to the power he gained.

programme.title: Franco: the Last Inquisitor
programme.sub-title: In the Name of Christ and the Empire
programme.desc: Franco experienced a remarkable rise through the ranks of the Spanish army until the Republican regime, in 1931, brought his career to a halt. The Civil War became his opportunity to seize absolute power in Spain.

programme.title: Franco: the Last Inquisitor
programme.desc: Having come to power through a coup, General Franco manoeuvred from 1939 until his death in 1975 to remain in control.

programme.title: Nazi Ratlines in Franco's Madrid
programme.desc: Explores how Madrid, under Franco's regime, became a crucial nexus for German Nazis and Italian Fascists fleeing the Second World War. They found a network of sympathisers who provided them with spaces and businesses where they could meet discreetly.

programme.desc: There was a time when Flea didn't jump. Flea didn't really move at all. She was very big and very round. All Flea wanted to do was to see the world. The animals try to help lift Flea high up, but she is too heavy. Then Tortoise comes up with an idea - movement and activity.

programme.title: Sion Y Chef

programme.title: Caban Banana Gareth yr Orangutan

programme.title: Odo

programme.desc: A glimpse into the life of the Hollywood star Joseph Cotten, who first gained fame in Broadway productions before his major roles in 'Citizen Kane', 'The Magnificent Ambersons', and 'Journey Into Fear'.

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.desc: The competition heads to Scotland, where the artists are tasked with painting stars such as Spandau Ballet's Gary Kemp. Later, a tight heat leads to an unexpected twist.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man has an unpleasant shock when he learns that his recently deceased father owed large sums of money to booksellers specialising in salacious volumes, and he resolves to save his mother from further distress.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: George Devon is murdered and one of his nephews is seen fleeing the scene. The problem is Devon's nephews are identical twins. Local Sheriff Milt Singleton has to work out a means of telling them apart and nailing the killer.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A prosecutor (Pat Hingle) considering a run for Congress is told that he may have convicted an innocent man.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A young gangster (Alex Nicol) tries to repay an old Army buddy (Don Keefer) by offering him cash to start a business. With Nita Talbot and Carmen Mathews.

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From the Vaults
programme.desc: Elbow frontman Guy Garvey walks through more era-defining musical performances, long lost studio appearances and interviews.

programme.title: Strange Journey: The Rocky Horror Picture Show
programme.desc: A London theatre play evolves into a groundbreaking cult phenomenon, featuring iconic songs and performances that celebrate individuality. The legacy lives on through midnight screenings and a devoted following that spans generations.

programme.title: Midnight Movies: From the Margin to the Mainstream
programme.desc: Filmmaker Stuart Samuels examines six cult movies that gained a late-night following, including `Night of the Living Dead', `Pink Flamingos' and `Eraserhead'.

programme.title: Johnson & Knopfler's Music Legends
programme.desc: Brian and Mark head to Nashville, Tennessee, to meet up with Mark's longtime friend and sometime collaborator, Emmylou Harris, who shares her career highlights and discusses her relationship with legendary country rock pioneer Gram Parsons. Along the way, the trio are joined for a jam session with country music guitarist Vince Gill.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2023 (Highlights)
programme.desc: Highlights of the Isle of Wight Festival, which this year featured headline sets from Pulp, George Ezra, The Chemical Brothers and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: The hard-won success of their predecessors enables stars like Shania Twain, Macy Gray, and Sarah McLachlan to overcome obstacles and reach new heights. Plus, a glimpse of a new generation featuring Taylor Swift, St Vincent, Billie Eilish, and more.

programme.title: André Rieu: Welcome to My World
programme.desc: André presents highlights of his concert for the inauguration of the new king and queen of the Netherlands, including an emotional performance of 'Time To Say Goodbye' and other favourites.

programme.title: Lang Lang My Favourite Melodies
programme.desc: The world-renowned pianist goes on a personal journey through his most beloved melodies.

programme.title: Lang Lang My Favourite Melodies
programme.desc: The world-renowned pianist goes on a personal journey through his most beloved melodies.

programme.title: Bagpipes: A Celebration
programme.desc: Bringing together the sounds of bands, drums, and solo pipers in a series of performances set against the landscapes of Scotland. Individual pipers discuss their connection to the tunes played, the locations, and the art of playing.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Norma owns a big house and lets her sister Emily and her husband live there, but when Emily disappears, Norma unwisely makes too much fuss about her suspicions.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Cara hires safecracker Sam to get back her confiscated jewels, but when she insists on joining him on the job, it looks like Sam might be making the biggest mistake of his career.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A rich, lonely American comes to London to find his long lost family to share his life and fortune. Unfortunately, chance meetings with his flatmates have disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When a pricey piece of art is stolen, its gallery owner gets his girlfriend to make copies of the painting to sell, she is suspicious about whether the work ever left the building in the first place.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman discovers a nasty side to her husband's personality when he goes into hospital before their holiday. At the same time, a kind radiologist takes a shine to her.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A mugging jogs the memory of an amnesiac (Richard Basehart) who remembers he is being sought for murder.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Plagued by a guilty conscience, a man (Barry Sullivan) confesses to his wife's murder, but his words fall on deaf ears.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by her suffocating schedule, touring European princess Ann takes off for a night while in Rome. When a sedative she took from her doctor kicks in, however, she falls asleep on a park bench and is found by an American reporter, Joe Bradley, who takes her back to his apartment for safety. At work the next morning, Joe finds out Ann's regal identity and bets his editor he can get exclusive interview with her, but romance soon gets in the way.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: Movie experts look back at the life and career of Jane Fonda, who won Oscars for her starring performances in the neo-noir crime-thriller 'Klute' and wartime drama 'Coming Home'.

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: A look at at recent intelligence history, from the defection of Oleg Gordievsky to the killing of Osama bin Laden.

programme.title: Making A Maestro
programme.desc: Step onto the podium as young conductors face the London Symphony Orchestra in a high stakes battle to prove they can become a maestro.

programme.title: The Shadows Final Tour
programme.desc: Hank Marvin, Bruce Welch and Brian Bennett are reunited for The Shadows final tour in 2004, treating crowds to a medley of their greatest hits, including `Apache,' `Living Doll' and `FBI'.

programme.desc: The fascinating story of the cultural, social, spiritual and musical revolution ignited by the Beatles.

programme.title: Stuart Sutcliffe: The Lost Beatle
programme.desc: Musician Stuart Sutcliffe dies of a cerebral haemorrhage shortly after leaving the Beatles.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: GRRR Live!
programme.desc: The definitive concert recorded on one of the most memorable shows in the Rolling Stones' history.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian O'Conner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owen's older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the world's population. It's now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: ‫On his quest to unravel the mystery of his own past, teenage social outcast Peter gains spider-like superpowers, and must deal with both high school and dangerous villains.‬

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, it's not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Man's role in his father's death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

The robots have the ability to change into different mechanical objects as they seek the key to ultimate power, but only human Sam Witwicky can save the world from total destruction.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Rock Dog 2: Rock Around the Park
programme.desc: Canine rocker Bodi and his band discover the price of fame when they go on tour with pop sensation Lil' Foxy.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Drebin returns for more madcap high jinks in this police-procedural spoof. Powerful energy corporations are intent on putting a halt to the eco-friendly plans of Dr Albert S. Meinheimer, the new US energy czar. They scheme to replace Meinheimer with an imposter who will do their bidding. Unfortunately for them, Drebin gets tangled up with their plans while trying to steal back his ex from her slimy new beau.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the upcoming Oscars ceremony from a bunch of mad bombers.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A gadget salesman is looking for a special gift for his son and finds one at a store in Chinatown. The shopkeeper is reluctant to sell him the 'mogwai' but sells it to him with the warning to never expose him to bright light, water, or to feed him after midnight. All of this happens and the result is a gang of gremlins that decide to tear up the town on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Six years after defeating the Gremlins, Billy and Kate have grown up and moved to New York. However, Billy stumbles across Gizmo in a genetics lab and when he gets wet, all hell breaks loose, and the stage is set for more deliciously bad taste humour.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Six years after defeating the Gremlins, Billy and Kate have grown up and moved to New York. However, Billy stumbles across Gizmo in a genetics lab and when he gets wet, all hell breaks loose, and the stage is set for more deliciously bad taste humour.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics' and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics' and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, Doug and three friends drive to Las Vegas for a wild and memorable stag party. In fact, when the three groomsmen wake up the next morning, they can't remember a thing, nor can they find Doug. With little time to spare, the three hazy pals try to re-trace their steps and find Doug so they can get him back to Los Angeles in time to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: It's been two years since the gang have narrowly escaped disaster in Bangkok. Now the gang have happy lives at home, but Alan doesn't. Still lacking a sense of purpose, Alan has gone off his meds and surrendered to his natural impulses.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, 'Thunderbirds'-style squad of puppets leads America's war on terrorism. The creators of 'South Park' go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, 'Thunderbirds'-style squad of puppets leads America's war on terrorism. The creators of 'South Park' go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A slick attorney fails to show up for his son's fifth birthday, prompting the boy to make a wish that his father would tell the truth for just one day. Miraculously, the wish is granted and for the next 24 hours, the formerly mendacious lawyer is unable to tell a single lie.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winner's podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesn't last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Madcap adult animated comedy where supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Madcap adult animated comedy where supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Bart, a black railroad worker is appointed sheriff of a town marked for destruction by Hedley Lamarr, a scheming politician. As Lamarr tries to drive out the town's residents, Bart decides to stand in his way.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: Danny Noonan, a teen down on his luck, works as a caddy at the snob-infested Bushwood Country Club to raise money for his college education. In an attempt to gain votes for a college scholarship reserved for caddies, Noonan volunteers to caddy for a prominent and influential club member. Meanwhile, Danny struggles to prepare for the high pressure Caddy Day golf tournament while absorbing New Age advice from wealthy golf guru Ty Webb.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary' following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove' on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap

The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman, Zsa-Zsa Korda appoints his only daughter, a nun, as sole heir to his estate. As Korda embarks on a new enterprise, they soon become the target of scheming tycoons, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress', life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A slick attorney fails to show up for his son's fifth birthday, prompting the boy to make a wish that his father would tell the truth for just one day. Miraculously, the wish is granted and for the next 24 hours, the formerly mendacious lawyer is unable to tell a single lie.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her sceptical husband to a renowned counsellor's marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: they've all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by one.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, confusion remains as to who is running the country.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: A reluctant bare-knuckle boxer and his manager brother must travel across the country for one last fight, but an unexpected travel companion exposes the cracks in their bond along the way.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout 'serial nice guy' living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased father's fortune, and a bright but awkward youth who's tired of his mother's depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. Charlie is one of the five kids who find a lucky ticket and goes on a tour of Wonka's chocolate factory.

The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Legendary pet detective Ace Ventura returns for another adventure when he's coerced out of retirement while on a soul-searching retreat in the Himalayas. He must now retrieve an endangered white bat from a village located in Africa. The sacred animal was offered up as a wedding dowry from the Wachootoo prince to the Wachati princess, and, if Ace can't track down the culprit behind the kidnapping in time, civil war will break out between the two rival tribes.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber

However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owner's kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark

Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hair's-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old man's notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielberg's 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Interview With the Vampire
programme.desc: When reporter Daniel Malloy's curiosity leads him to interview the mysterious Louis De Pointe Du Lac, the last thing he expects is to find himself talking to a vampire. Once a plantation owner in Louisiana, Louis tells his life story, recalling how becoming a widower led him down a path to immortality and a conflict with the vampire Lestat, who made him what he is.

programme.desc: Grammy Award-winning music act Milli Vanilli become the first act to have their prize stripped from them after they are exposed as a fake enterprise with the singers lip-syncing to pre-recorded tracks.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: As rioting and civil unrest rocks Detroit during the summer of 1967, several policemen begin interrogating guests at the Algiers Motel. By the end of the night, three unarmed men are gunned down while several others are brutally beaten.

programme.title: The Young Messiah
programme.desc: Seven-year-old Jesus starts to discover his miraculous powers while travelling with Mary and Joseph to Nazareth.

programme.title: The Death of Stalin
programme.desc: When dictator Joseph Stalin dies, his parasitic cronies square off in a frantic power struggle to become the next Soviet leader. As they bumble, brawl and back-stab their way to the top, confusion remains as to who is running the country.

programme.title: Save The Cinema
programme.desc: A Welsh hairdresser starts a campaign in the 90s to save her small town's theatre. With the help of a local politician, they manage to get Steven Spielberg to show a premier of 'Jurassic Park' in a bid to save the cinema.

programme.title: The United States vs. Billie Holiday
programme.desc: The Federal Bureau of Narcotics launches an undercover sting operation against jazz singer Billie Holiday.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Harding's life and legacy instantly become tarnished as she's forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: The Colour Room
programme.desc: A determined, working class woman, Clarice Cliff, breaks the glass ceiling and revolutionises the workplace in the 20th century.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest of a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Lee
programme.desc: The story of photographer Elizabeth 'Lee' Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.
